releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: First annual release of LSST survey data (timing to be confirmed).

releases.label: DP1
releases.summary: First real-sky release: LSSTComCam commissioning data (7-week campaign, Oct-Dec 2024); ~2.3M distinct objects, ~3.5 TB; Rubin Science Platform access for data-rights holders.

releases.label: DP0.2
releases.summary: Data Preview 0.2: simulated DESC DC2 5-year depth dataset reprocessed with the LSST Science Pipelines; simulated data, on the RSP.
